---
title: "Research topic"
output: html_document
---

# DS2020: Final Project

Members: Samara Feldhacker (samara28), Alina Kirkpatrick (alinayjk)

### Data Desccription

- What dataset you are using (include a link if applicable)

Multiple online race results for specifically the Iowa Trail Run Series during 2025. These are all downloadable as CSV file and contain all participant results along with a few other aspects corresponding to the partcipants. We may also combine other datasets, like weather data, where needed.

- Initial data cleaning steps you anticipate

Current the CSV file contains information on Pos,Race No,Name,Time,Category,Cat Pos,Gender,Gen Pos,City,State,Pace,Start,Finish,Pace. But all of this data is within the first cell of the CSV and are not separated, so we will need to separate the data to become more usable for further analysis.

- Basic/marginal summaries you have explored or plan to explore

Basic summaries would be the number of people that participated within the event, then the number of people that participated within each specific event. After that the average age of the participants, the number of people in Male and Female, the average pace, etc.


### Project idea / research questions:
- What are you trying to investigate?

- What analyses or visualizations do you expect to use?
